description: Abashayeli kumele balandele imithetho yomgwaqo ejwayelekile ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha nokuhamba kahle kwezimoto. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukulalela izimpawu zomgwaqo, izimpawu, kanye nezimpawu zomgwaqo. Ukwehluleka ukulandela le mithetho kungaholela ezingozini nasezijezisweni.

Abashayeli kudingeka bavumele ezinye izimoto noma abahamba ngezinyawo ukuthi bangene ezimpambanweni zemigwaqo, ezindaweni ezizungezile izimoto, nasezindaweni zokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo, phakathi kwezinye izindawo. Ukwehluleka ukunikezela kuyindlela kuyicala.

Abashayeli kumele basebenzise imizila efanele futhi balandele izimpawu zemizila. Lokhu kufaka phakathi imithetho yokushintsha imizila, ukudlula abanye, kanye nokusebenzisa imizila yamabhayisikili noma yamabhasi. Ukwephulwa kwemithetho kungabangela izinhlawulo noma izingozi.

Abashayeli kumele baqaphele imithetho yethilamu, okuhlanganisa nokunikeza abahambi ngezinyawo ithuba ezitobhini zethilamu, ukuma kwamathilamu aneminyango evulekile, kanye nokungadluli amathilamu ngaphansi kwezimo ezithile.
Ezimpambanweni zemigwaqo, abashayeli kumele balandele izinqubo ezifanele zokuyeka nokuma ezimpawini zokuma noma ezibanini zomgwaqo. Ukuqonda le mithetho kubalulekile ekuvimbeleni izingozi.
Ukujika kwe-U kuvunyelwe kuphela ezimpambanweni zemigwaqo noma uma kungekho sibonakaliso esikuvimbelayo. Abashayeli kumele baqinisekise ukuthi kuphephile ngaphambi kokwenza ukujika kwe-U.
Abashayeli kumele balandele imikhawulo yejubane ebekwe ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha emgwaqweni. Ukusheshisa kungaholela ezinhlawulweni, ekulahlekelweni yilayisensi, kanye nasengcupheni enkulu yezingozi.

Abashayeli kumele banikeze abahambi ngezinyawo ithuba lapho bewela futhi baqinisekise ukuphepha kwabo lapho beseduze nezindawo zabahamba ngezinyawo. Ukwehluleka ukuma kwabahamba ngezinyawo lapho bewela kuyicala.
Abashayeli kumele bame lapho kuwela khona izitimela lapho izibani zikhanya noma amasango e-boom ecishiwe. Ukungazinaki lezi zimpawu kuyicala elibi futhi kungabangela izinhlawulo nezingozi.
Abashayeli kumele banikeze ithuba izimoto eziphuthumayo ezisebenzisa izibani ezikhanyayo nama-siren, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imoto inendlela ecacile yokuhamba phakathi kwezimoto.

Izimpawu zomthetho zinikeza imiyalelo ephoqelekile kubashayeli, njengemikhawulo yesivinini, imikhawulo yokujika, kanye nokungabi nazo izimpawu zokungena. Ukulandela lezi zimpawu kuyadingeka ngokomthetho ukuze kulondolozwe ukuphepha nokuhleleka emigwaqweni.

Izimpawu zokuxwayisa zixwayisa abashayeli ngezingozi ezingaba khona, njengokugoba okubukhali, izindawo zesikole, kanye nokuwela izilwane zasendle. Lezi zimpawu zisiza abashayeli ukulungisa ukushayela kwabo ukuze bagweme izingozi.
Izimpawu zesivinini zibonisa isivinini esiphezulu noma esincane esivunyelwe emgwaqweni. Abashayeli kumele balandele le mikhawulo ukuqinisekisa izimo zokushayela eziphephile futhi bagweme izinhlawulo.

Izibani zomgwaqo zilawula ukuhamba kwezimoto kanye nabahamba ngezinyawo ezindaweni zokuhlangana kwemigwaqo. Ubomvu busho ukuthi yima, uluhlaza busho ukuthi hamba, kanti ophuzi uyisixwayiso sokulungiselela ukuma.

Izimpawu zabahamba ngezinyawo zibonisa ukuthi kuphephile nini ukuba abahamba ngezinyawo bawele umgwaqo. Lezi zimpawu zivame ukuhambisana nezibani zomgwaqo ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabahamba ngezinyawo.
Izimpawu zokulawula imizila zisetshenziselwa ukukhombisa ukuthi umzila uvuliwe noma uvaliwe. Lezi zimpawu zivame ukusetshenziswa emigwaqweni enemizila eminingi kanye nasemathuneni.
Azikho izimpawu zokupaka ezibonisa izindawo lapho ukuma noma ukupaka kungavunyelwe khona. Lokhu kuvame ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ithrafikhi ihamba kahle futhi ukuphepha kuyagcinwa.
Izimpawu ezibonisa indlela eyodwa zibonisa ukuthi ithrafikhi kumele ihambe ngendlela eyodwa kuphela. Ukungazinaki lezi zimpawu kungabangela izingozi nemiphumela yezomthetho.
Izimpawu zokuma zidinga abashayeli ukuthi bame ngokuphelele futhi bavumele noma yiziphi ezinye izimoto noma abahamba ngezinyawo ngaphambi kokuba baqhubeke.
Nika izimpawu zendlela utshele abashayeli ukuthi bavumele abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo, kungaba abahamba ngezinyawo noma izimoto, kuye ngesimo, ukuze kuvinjelwe izingozi.

Umkhawulo wejubane ozenzakalelayo endaweni eyakhiwe eVictoria ungamakhilomitha angama-50 ngehora ngaphandle kokuthi kusayinwe ngenye indlela. Hlola njalo izimpawu ezibekiwe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ushayela ngaphakathi kwemikhawulo yejubane esemthethweni.
Endaweni yesikole esayiniwe phakathi namahora achazwe kusibonakaliso, umkhawulo wejubane wehliswa ube ngu-40 km/h ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwezingane eziwela umgwaqo.

Ibanga lokulandela eliphephile okungenani ngaphansi kwezimo ezifanele lingemuva kwemoto engaphambili okungenani imizuzwana emibili. Lokhu kuvumela isikhathi esanele sokusabela uma imoto engaphambili ima ngokuzumayo.
Uma udlula i-tram emile endaweni yokuphepha, kufanele wehlise ijubane lakho libe yi-10 km/h ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabagibeli abagibela noma abehla e-tram.

Emigwaqweni yasemakhaya engenazo izimpawu zejubane, umkhawulo wejubane ozenzakalelayo u-100 km/h ngaphandle kokuthi kuchazwe ngenye indlela izimpawu zendawo. Lungisa ijubane lakho ukuze lihambisane nezimo zomgwaqo ukuze ulondoloze ukuphepha.
Ezimweni zezulu ezimanzi, kufanele wandise ibanga lakho elilandelayo libe okungenani imizuzwana emine. Imigwaqo emanzi inciphisa ukubambelela, okudinga isikhathi esengeziwe sokuma ngokuphepha.

Lalela izimpawu zesivinini eziguquguqukayo ze-elekthronikhi ngaso sonke isikhathi uma zisebenza. Lezi zimpawu zilungisa imikhawulo yesivinini ngokusekelwe ezimweni zethrafikhi, isimo sezulu, noma izehlakalo emgwaqweni.
Njengoba ijubane lakho likhuphuka, ibanga lokuma elidingekayo ukuze imoto yakho ime ngokuphepha nalo liyakhula. Njalo qiniseka ukuthi unebanga elanele lokusabela ezingozini.

Ezindaweni ezihlanganyelwe, umkhawulo wejubane ngokuvamile u-10 km/h ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabahamba ngezinyawo nabahamba ngamabhayisikili kulezi zindawo lapho izimoto nabasebenzisi bomgwaqo abangenazo izinjini bexhumana khona.
Ukugibela umsila kuyingozi ngoba kunciphisa isikhathi sokusabela kanye nokubhuleka. Hlala ulandela ibanga eliphephile, ikakhulukazi uma ushayela ngemuva kwezimoto ezinkulu ezingase zikuvimbe.

Abashayeli kumele bafeze izibopho zomthetho ezahlukahlukene, njengokunikeza usizo ngemuva kwengozi, ukushintshana ngemininingwane ngemuva kwezingozi, nokubika izehlakalo eziphathimandleni njengoba kudingeka ngokomthetho.
Abashayeli kumele bahlale belawula izimoto zabo ngaso sonke isikhathi, bagweme iziphazamiso futhi bagxile ekuqinisekiseni ukuphepha kwabo nokwabanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.
Uma kwenzeka ingozi ebangela ukulimala, abashayeli kumele bame futhi banikeze usizo lapho kungenzeka khona. Ukwehluleka ukuma nokusiza ezimweni ezinjalo kuwukwephula umthetho.

Kubalulekile ukuthi abashayeli bahlale belawula izimoto zabo ngokugcwele ngaso sonke isikhathi, beqinisekisa ukuthi basabela ngendlela efanele ezimweni zethrafikhi ezishintshayo futhi balondoloze indawo yokushayela ephephile.
Abashayeli kumele babike ingozi emaphoyiseni uma kukhona olimele noma impahla yonakele futhi imininingwane ingeke ishintshwe. Ukwehluleka ukubika lezi zigameko kungaholela ekujezisweni.

Ukukhathala kuyingozi enkulu lapho ushayela. Abashayeli kufanele baqaphele izimpawu zokuqala zokukhathala, njengokukhamuluka nokulahlekelwa ukugxilisa ingqondo, futhi bathathe isinyathelo esifanele ukuvimbela izingozi.
Abashayeli kumele baveze ilayisensi yabo uma becelwa ngamaphoyisa. Ukwenqaba ukunikeza ilayisensi kungabangela izinhlawulo noma imiphumela eyengeziwe yezomthetho.

Abashayeli kufanele bagweme ukusebenzisa i-horn ngokungadingekile, ngoba ingathusa noma iphazamise abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo. I-horn kufanele isetshenziswe kuphela ukuxwayisa abanye ngokuba khona kwakho ezimweni lapho kudingeka khona.
Uma uzizwa ukhathele kakhulu ukuthi ungaqhubeka nokushayela, impendulo ephephile kakhulu ukuma uphumule ngaphambi kokuqhubeka. Ukushayela ukhathele kwandisa kakhulu ingozi yezingozi.

Abashayeli banomthwalo wemfanelo wokuqinisekisa ukuthi abagibeli babo bahlezi kahle futhi bavikelwe. Lokhu kuhlanganisa nokuqinisekisa ukuthi izingane zisezithendeni ezifanele zezingane nokuthi abantu abadala bafaka amabhande ezihlalo.

EVictoria, abashayeli abafundayo kanye nabashayeli abasahlolwa (P1 kanye neP2) kumele bagcine izinga lotshwala egazini elingu-0.00 (BAC) ngaso sonke isikhathi. Abashayeli abanelayisensi ephelele banomkhawulo we-BAC ongu-0.05, kodwa kuphephile ukungaphuzi nhlobo lapho ushayela.
Utshwala buphazamisa ukwahlulela, isikhathi sokusabela, kanye nokuxhumana, okungandisa kakhulu ingozi yezingozi. Ngisho notshwala obuncane bunganciphisa ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha.

Ukushayela uphuze izidakamizwa, okuhlanganisa nemithi kadokotela, kungalimaza ikhono lakho lokushayela, noma ngabe uzizwa ungakhubazekile. Kubalulekile ukuqaphela izingozi nokugwema ukushayela ngemuva kokusebenzisa izidakamizwa.

Ngaphambi kokuqala umuthi omusha kadokotela, hlola ukuthi uyayithinta yini ikhono lakho lokushayela bese ulandela iseluleko sezokwelapha. Eminye imithi ingabangela ukozela noma iphazamise ukugxilisa ingqondo.

Ukukhathala kungalimaza ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha, njengotshwala noma izidakamizwa. Qiniseka ukuthi uphumula ngokwanele ngaphambi kokushayela, futhi uthathe ikhefu phakathi nohambo olude ukuze unciphise ingozi yezingozi ezihlobene nokukhathala.
Ngemva kokuphuza, isikhathi kuphela esinganciphisa inani lotshwala emzimbeni wakho. Ikhofi, ishawa ebandayo, noma ezinye izindlela azisheshisi le nqubo.

EVictoria, bonke abafundi kanye nabashayeli abasahlolwa kumele babe ne-BAC engu-0.00. Kubashayeli abanelayisensi egcwele, umkhawulo we-BAC ungu-0.05. Kodwa-ke, ukugwema utshwala ngaphambi kokushayela kuhlale kuyindlela ephephile.

Ungajeziswa eVictoria ngokushayela unezidakamizwa ezithile emzimbeni wakho, noma ngabe uzizwa ungakhubazekile. Ukukhubazeka kwezidakamizwa kuthinta ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha futhi kwandisa ingozi yezingozi.

Ngaphambi kokushayela, hlola njalo ukuthi imithi emisha ingathinta yini ikhono lakho lokusebenzisa imoto. Eminye imithi ibangela ukozela, iphazamise izikhathi zokusabela, futhi yehlise ukugxilisa ingqondo.

Ukukhathala kungaba nomthelela ofanayo ekushayeleni njengotshwala. Kunciphisa isikhathi sakho sokuphendula, kuphazamise ukwahlulela kwakho, futhi kunciphisa ikhono lakho lokwenza izinqumo, okwandisa ingozi yezingozi.
Uma usondela engozini engaba khona, impendulo ephephile kakhulu iwukwehlisa ijubane bese ulungiselela ukuyeka uma kudingeka. Lokhu kukunika isikhathi sokuhlola isimo bese usamukela ngendlela efanele.
Ukuskena kusenesikhathi ngenkathi ushayela kubalulekile ukuze uthole izingozi ezingaba khona kusenesikhathi. Lokhu kukuvumela ukuthi uhlele impendulo yakho futhi ugweme ukusabela okungazelelwe.
Ukushayela ngokuzivikela kuhilela ukuqaphela amaphutha angase avele kwabanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo nokugcina ibanga eliphephile ukuze kugwenywe ukushayisana.

Uma amathayi akho ehluleka ukubamba emgwaqweni omanzi, yehlisa i-accelerator bese ushayela kahle. Ukubhuleka okungazelelwe noma ukujika okubukhali kungenza isimo sibe sibi kakhulu futhi kuholele ekulahlekelweni ukulawula.

Uma ushayela emotweni, indawo engcono kakhulu yokuqaphela izingozi ingaphambili kakhulu futhi isemaceleni, hhayi nje ukugxila emotweni ephambi kwakho. Lokhu kukusiza ukuthi ubikezele izingozi kusenesikhathi.
Uma imoto isondela emzileni wayo ongaphambili, impendulo ephephile ukwandisa ibanga lakho lokulandela. Lokhu kukunika isikhathi esengeziwe sokusabela uma isimo siba sibi kakhulu.
Umgwaqo uvame ukushelela kakhulu emizuzwini embalwa yokuqala ngemva kwemvula. Qaphela kakhulu ngalesi sikhathi, njengoba uwoyela kanye nemfucumfucu emgwaqweni kungenza kube yingozi kakhulu.

Ukuze ulawule ukukhanya okuvela ezibanini ezingaphambili ebusuku, bheka kancane ohlangothini lwesobunxele lomzila wakho bese wehlisa ijubane uma kudingeka. Lokhu kusiza ukugwema ukuchayeka ngqo ezibanini ezikhanyayo.
Uma umshayeli ekulandela eduze kakhulu, isinyathelo esiphephile ukwandisa ibanga lakho lokulandela imoto engaphambili. Lokhu kunikeza wena nomshayeli ohamba ngemuva isikhala esengeziwe sokusabela.
Uma ushayela enkungwini, yehlisa isivinini futhi ugcine ibanga elengeziwe phakathi kwemoto yakho nabanye. Inkungu inciphisa kakhulu ukubonakala futhi yandisa ingozi yezingozi.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Ezimpambanweni zemigwaqo ezingenazo izimpawu noma izimpawu, imoto esondela ngakwesokudla kumele inikezele indlela emotweni evela kwesobunxele.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Ku-roundabout, izimoto esezivele zise-roundabout zibaluleke kakhulu. Abashayeli abangena ku-roundabout kumele babanike ithuba.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Uma ujika ngakwesobunxele, kufanele unikeze indlela abahambi ngezinyawo abawela umgwaqo owungenayo, uqinisekise ukuphepha kwabo.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Esigcawini se-T, imoto esemgwaqweni ophelayo kumele inikezele izimoto ezisemgwaqweni oqhubekayo indlela.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Uma ujika u-U, kufanele unikeze zonke ezinye izimoto kanye nabahamba ngezinyawo indawo, uqinisekise ukuphepha kwazo ngenkathi ujika.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Uma uphuma endaweni ezungezile, shiya uphawu ngaphambi nje kokuba uphume ukuze wazise abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo ngezinhloso zakho.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Uma ungena emgwaqweni usuka endaweni yokungena, kufanele unikeze zonke izimoto kanye nabahamba ngezinyawo emgwaqweni ithuba lokuvimbela izingozi.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Ngaphambi kokujika kwesokudla, beka imoto yakho eduze ngangokunokwenzeka enkabeni yomgwaqo, uqinisekise ukuthi ijika liphephile futhi licacile.

category: Izindawo zokuhlangana, amajika kanye nezindawo ezizungezile
description: Umcibisholo oluhlaza ubonisa ukuthi ungaqhubeka uye ngakwesomcibisholo ngaphandle kokunikeza abanye abantu noma abahamba ngezinyawo ithuba.
Umugqa ophakathi oqhubekayo uvame ukusho ukuthi akumelwe uwuwele, ngaphandle uma ungena noma uphuma emgwaqweni noma endleleni yokungena.
Ukudlula ngakwesobunxele kuvunyelwe emgwaqweni onemizila eminingi uma izimoto zisezindleleni ezihlukile eziphawuliwe futhi kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo.
Ungase udlule imoto ngakwesobunxele emgwaqweni onomzila owodwa lapho imoto engaphambili ijika kwesokudla futhi kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo.

Ngaphambi kokushintsha imizila, faka uphawu futhi uqinisekise ukuthi kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo. Lokhu kuqinisekisa ukuthi abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo bayazi ngezinhloso zakho futhi kuvimbela izingozi.
Isiqhingi sethrafikhi esipendiwe, noma uphawu lwe-chevron, lubonisa ukuthi akumelwe ushayele kuso, okuqinisekisa ukuhamba okuphephile kwethrafikhi.
Uma ungaqiniseki ukuthi kuphephile yini ukudlulela komunye umuntu, isinyathelo esiphephile kakhulu ukungayidluli. Hlola njalo isimo ngaphambi kokuthatha isinyathelo.
Umugqa ophakathi ophukile usho ukuthi ungawuwela uma kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo, okuvumela ukudlula noma ukushintsha umzila.
Ukuhamba ngezinyawo emigwaqweni emibili kuvunyelwe kuphela uma izimpawu zomgwaqo zikuvumela. Ngokuvamile akuphephile noma akuvunyelwe ngaphansi kwezimo eziningi zokushayela.
Uma imoto oyidlulayo iqala ukushesha, impendulo ephephile kakhulu ukuyeka ukudlulela emuva uma kuphephile.
Umugqa ophakathi ophindwe kabili oqhubekayo usho ukuthi akumelwe uwuwele noma uwugibele ngaphansi kwanoma yiziphi izimo, okuqinisekisa ukuhamba kwezimoto nokuphepha.
Ukungami kusho ukuthi akumelwe ume nhlobo, kanti i-No Parking ivumela ukuma isikhashana ukuze uthathwe noma wehliswe.
Endaweni Engavunyelwe Ukupaka, uvunyelwe ukuma isikhathi eside ngokwanele ukuthwala noma ukwehlisa abagibeli.
Ukupaka eduze kwemigwaqo yemigwaqo kuvame ukuvinjelwa ngoba kungavimba ukubonakala futhi kudale izingozi kubashayeli nakubahamba ngezinyawo.
Awuvunyelwe ukuma endaweni engavunyelwe ukuma, noma ngabe uphendula ucingo noma udinga ukuma ngokushesha.
Indlela evulekile isho ukuthi akumelwe ume noma upake kulolo hlangothi lomgwaqo ngesikhathi sokusebenza kwawo.
Ukuma eduze kwendawo yokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo kuyingozi njengoba kungafihla abahamba ngezinyawo ekusondeleni kwabashayeli, okwandisa ingozi yezingozi.
Ungama kuphela endaweni lapho kungami khona uma kudingeka ngenxa yezimo zethrafikhi noma esimweni esiphuthumayo.
Uma upaka egqumeni, hlala ufaka ibhuleki lesandla bese ubopha imoto ukuze unciphise ingozi yokugingqika.
Akumelwe upake eduze kakhulu nekhoneni ngoba kungavimba umbono wezimoto eziza eduze nabantu abahamba ngezinyawo, okubangela izingozi.
Uphawu oluthi Akukho Ukupaka olunezikhathi ezibonisiwe lusho ukuthi umkhawulo usebenza kuphela ngezikhathi ezibonisiwe ophawulweni.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Uma bejika, abashayeli kumele bavumele abahamba ngezinyawo bawele umgwaqo ongena kuwo. Lokhu kusebenza noma ngabe umuntu ohamba ngezinyawo akekho endaweni yokuwela eqokiwe.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Abashayeli kumele banikeze isikhala esengeziwe lapho bedlula abagibeli bamabhayisikili njengoba bengase badinge indawo yokugwema izingozi noma ukugcina ibhalansi.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Eduze kwezindawo zokuthenga noma izindawo zokuthutha zomphakathi, abashayeli kufanele balindele ukwanda komsebenzi wabahamba ngezinyawo kanye nokuwela okungazelelwe. Hlala uqaphile kulezi zindawo.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Uma umgibeli webhayisikili egibele umzila webhayisikili ophawuliwe, abashayeli kumele bagweme ukushayela umzila ngaphandle uma kuvunyelwe futhi kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Abashayeli kumele baqaphele kakhulu eduze kwezikole njengoba izingane zingase zenze ngendlela engalindelekile futhi zihlulele kabi ithrafikhi. Yehlisa ijubane ezindaweni zesikole.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Uma umgibeli webhayisikili egibele phakathi nomzila omncane, abashayeli kufanele balinde kuze kube yilapho kuphephile ukudlula kunesikhala esanele, kunokuba badlule ngenkani.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Esiphambanweni sezingane, abashayeli kumele bame lapho kubekwa amafulegi futhi kukhona abahamba ngezinyawo, okuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwezingane.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Abashayeli kufanele bahlole njalo izindawo abangaboni kahle kuzo ngaphambi kokujika, njengoba abagibeli bamabhayisikili kungenzeka ukuthi bahamba eceleni komgwaqo ongabonakali, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni zasemadolobheni.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Abantu asebekhulile abahamba ngezinyawo bangadinga isikhathi esengeziwe sokuwela, njengoba bengase bahambe kancane noma babe nezinkinga zokuhamba. Banike isikhala nesikhathi sokuwela ngokuphepha.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Abagibele amabhayisikili bangase babe nzima ukubabona lapho besondela ezimpambanweni zemigwaqo, futhi bangahamba ngokushesha. Njalo nikeza abagibele amabhayisikili isikhala nesikhathi sokuhamba ngokuphepha.
Imikhawulo yesivinini sendawo yesikole isebenza kuphela ngezikhathi eziboniswe ezimpawini. Qiniseka ukuthi uyayilandela ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwezingane.
Abashayeli kumele behlise ijubane ezindaweni zesikole noma ngabe akukho bantwana ababonakalayo, njengoba izingane zingase zivele ngokuzumayo futhi zingalindelekile.
Uma usondela emsebenzini wokulungisa umgwaqo, yehlisa ijubane bese ulandela noma yiziphi izimpawu zesikhashana ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabasebenzi nabanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.
Imikhawulo yesivinini iyancishiswa ezindaweni zomsebenzi womgwaqo ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabasebenzi kanye nokwamukela izinguquko ezimweni zomgwaqo.
Emigwaqweni yasemakhaya, izilwane zasendle zingangena emgwaqweni ngokungazelelwe. Hlala ulungele ukuma noma ukunciphisa ijubane lapho ushayela ezindaweni zasemakhaya.
Imigwaqo engavaliwe ivame ukuba nekhono lokubamba elinciphile kanye nokubhuleka. Abashayeli kufanele banciphise isivinini lapho beshayela ezindaweni ezingavaliwe.
Uma uphuthelwa indlela yakho yokuphuma emgwaqweni omkhulu, qhubeka uye endaweni yokuphuma elandelayo bese ujika ngokuphephile. Ungazami ukuma noma ukubuyela emuva emgwaqweni omkhulu.
Akukho emthethweni ukuma emgwaqweni omkhulu ngaphandle uma kunesimo esiphuthumayo. Sebenzisa njalo i-shoulder noma i-exit ramp uma kwenzeka iphutha.
Uma lina kakhulu, yehlisa isivinini bese wandisa ibanga lakho elilandelayo. Imigwaqo emanzi inganciphisa ukubambelela futhi yandise amabanga okuma.
Inkungu inciphisa ukubona nokubona okujulile, okwenza ukushayela kube yingozi kakhulu. Yehlisa ijubane futhi wandise ibanga lokulandela ezimweni ezinenkungu.
Uma imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo isondela ngezibani kanye/noma i-siren, suka endleleni yayo bese uyivumela ukuthi idlule ngokuphepha.

Uma usezibanini zomgwaqo futhi imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo isondela ngemuva, isinyathelo esiphephile ukugudluka uma kuphephile futhi kusemthethweni, kungenjalo hlala phansi bese uyivumela idlule uma kungenzeka.
Uma iphoyisa likuqondisa ngendlela ehlukile kunophawu, kufanele ulandele isiqondiso samaphoyisa.
Uma imoto yesimo esiphuthumayo imiswa izibani zikhanya eceleni komgwaqo, yehlisa ijubane bese udlula ngokucophelela, uhambe uma kuphephile.
Uma amaphoyisa ebeka umgwaqo wesikhashana, landela imiyalelo yawo kanye nanoma yiziphi izindlela eziphambukayo.
Akufanele ulandele eduze ngemuva kwemoto yezimo eziphuthumayo ukuze udlule ngokushesha emgwaqweni.
Uma uzwa i-siren kodwa ungayiboni imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo okwamanje, hlala uqaphile, hlola izibuko, futhi ulungele ukuhamba ngokuphephile.
Uma umlawuli wethrafikhi emsebenzini wokulungisa umgwaqo enikeza iziqondiso, kufanele ulalele umlawuli wethrafikhi.
Uma amaphoyisa ekuyala ukuthi ume ukuze uhlolwe ilayisensi, yima ngokuphepha njengoba uyaliwe.
Uma usemzileni owodwa futhi imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo isondela ngemuva, bonisa uphawu bese usuka kwesobunxele noma uye endaweni ephephile uma kungenzeka.
